title: G5: Intersection form, signature, and characteristic classes of CP^{2k}

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
**Foundational computations to write out explicitly.** (i) $H^*(\mathbb{CP}^{2k};\mathbb{R})=\mathbb{R}[x]/(x^{2k+1})$, $x\in H^2$; the middle cohomology $H^{2k}$ is 1-dimensional spanned by $x^k$, with intersection number $\langle x^k\smile x^k,[\mathbb{CP}^{2k}]\rangle=\langle x^{2k},[\mathbb{CP}^{2k}]\rangle=1>0$, hence the form is positive definite of rank 1 and $\tau(\mathbb{CP}^{2k})=1$.

(ii) The total Pontryagin class of $T\mathbb{CP}^{2k}$ is $(1+x^2)^{2k+1}$ (from $T\mathbb{CP}^n\oplus\underline{\mathbb{C}}\cong(2k+1)$ copies of the dual tautological line bundle and $p=c\bar c$). 

These underpin G1 and G4 and must be stated and proved (not merely quoted), since the whole normalization rests on them.
